title: OmniFormatter lang-python Configuration Schema
description: Configuration options for the Python language module. All fields optional. Defaults match Black 24.x.

lineLength.description: Maximum line length. Black default is 88, not 80.

skipStringNormalization.description: If true, do not normalize string quotes. Preserves original quote style.

skipMagicTrailingComma.description: If true, ignore trailing commas that force multi-line output.

targetVersion.description: Target Python version(s). Affects some formatting decisions.

mode.description: 'opinionated' = Black 24.x compat guaranteed. 'advanced' = full option surface.
